based_on.manual_overlap_review: comment-backed passport plus deterministic matrix preflight; accepted despite overlap-heavy warning because the expert adds a precision production-inference viewpoint around prefix caching, vLLM serving, latency/cost economics, and context-as-runtime-cost

accepted_cells.admission_interpretation: accepted as a precision specialization inside an already-covered exact cell: prefix caching, vLLM serving, vLLM vs Ollama, MaaS vs self-hosted LLM, and production cost/latency tradeoffs
accepted as adjacent infrastructure value around long-context degradation, context rot, and context design as a cost and quality constraint
accepted only as supporting runtime-oriented perspective on Skills vs MCP and dynamic tool lists, not as a broad new agent-workflow source

routing_notes: Strongest fit: production LLM inference, prefix/prompt caching, cache hit rate, vLLM, semantic routing, serving economics, and latency/cost optimization.
Useful as a complement to Neuraldeep and PashaZloy: less local-hardware/open-source breadth, more product-runtime economics and Bitrix24-backed production framing.
Useful as a complement to Polyakov, Aimasters.Me, Rinat, and Refat only when agent/tool/skills questions touch runtime constraints, context growth, caching, or tool-list stability.
Comment signal is available in the packet and DB, but the channel is still overlap-heavy; do not route as the default generic coding-agent expert.
Do not route by default for generic AI news, beginner prompting, creative/multimodal workflows, enterprise governance, or security/compliance.
recommended_manifest_caveat: accepted as production LLM inference / prefix-cache / vLLM serving / cost-latency specialist; overlap-heavy with existing infra and agent experts, so route as a precision source for cache hit rate, vLLM vs Ollama, MaaS vs self-hosted, semantic routing, and context/caching economics; avoid default routing for generic AI news, beginner prompting, broad agent workflows, creative/multimodal, enterprise governance, or generic security/compliance
